import i18n from'i18next';import{initReactI18next}from'react-i18next';import LanguageDetector from'i18next-browser-languagedetector';// Import all locale files
const languages=['english','hindi','telugu','kannada','tamil','malayalam','bengali','marathi','gujarati','punjabi','odia'];const namespaces=['consent','questionnaire','thankyou'];const resources={};languages.forEach(lang=>{resources[lang]={};namespaces.forEach(ns=>{try{resources[lang][ns]=require("./assets/locales/".concat(lang,"/").concat(ns,".json"));}catch(e){console.error("Could not load locale file for ".concat(lang,"/").concat(ns));}});});i18n.use(LanguageDetector).use(initReactI18next).init({resources,fallbackLng:'english',debug:false,interpolation:{escapeValue:false},ns:namespaces,defaultNS:'consent'});export default i18n;
